scripts.cv:build: mkdir -p public/cv src/data/cv && typst compile --root . --font-path src/resume/fonts src/resume/src/chinese.typ public/cv/chinese.pdf && typst compile --root . --font-path src/resume/fonts src/resume/src/english.typ public/cv/english.pdf && node scripts/parse-cv.mjs src/resume/src/chinese.typ src/data/cv/zh.json && node scripts/parse-cv.mjs src/resume/src/english.typ src/data/cv/en.json
scripts.build: bun run cv:build && astro build && pagefind --site dist
